revenue_recognition.management_fees: Base management fees recognized over time as services rendered. Incentive management fees based on hotel profitability metrics.
revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Franchise and other fees recognized over time including initial franchise fees amortized over franchise agreement term.
revenue_recognition.loyalty_program: Points-based program; revenues deferred and recognized upon redemption or breakage. Deferred revenue liability $1,333M at 12/31/2024, actuarially determined.
revenue_recognition.distribution: ALG Vacations — net vs. gross recognition depending on principal vs. agent determination.
revenue_recognition.co_branded_credit_cards: Multiple performance obligations (license, loyalty points, free nights) allocated using relative standalone selling prices.
revenue_recognition.reimbursed_costs: Costs incurred on behalf of managed/franchised hotels recognized as revenue with offsetting expense.

depreciation_amortization.leasehold_improvements: Shorter of lease term or useful life

impairment_policy.method: Quarterly assessment of property/equipment and definite-lived intangibles. Undiscounted cash flow test; if carrying value exceeds, fair value determined via discounted cash flows, appraisals, or broker valuations.
impairment_policy.goodwill_impairment_reporting_unit: Management and franchising segment reporting unit
impairment_policy.fair_value_method: Weighted methodology: discounted future cash flows + guideline public companies method

income_tax.note: Full tax note detail not separately extracted at line-item level; deferred tax assets $466M suggest significant timing differences

subsequent_events.note: Form 8-K attached as Exhibit A-2. Details not deeply extracted but includes debt issuance information.

related_party_transactions.affiliate_revenue_from_franchisees: $17,684,840 in fees from Brand Hotel franchisees (FY2024)
related_party_transactions.loyalty_program_net_benefit: $68,882,587 more in reimbursements than fees paid by franchisees (FY2024)
related_party_transactions.note: Hyatt Group entities provide virtually all system services to franchisees. Hyatt Corporation is primary service provider.

advertising_fund_accounting.mechanism: Commercial Services Fee (3.5% GRR) covers marketing as part of System Services
advertising_fund_accounting.note: No periodic accounting of Commercial Services Fee spending provided to franchisees. Hyatt Group will not use funds principally to solicit new franchise sales.

share_repurchases.note: Significant capital return program — $1.19B in repurchases in 2024 alone

investing_activities.note: Asset-light transformation: $1.4B in real estate sale proceeds vs. $170M capex
